item.title: Docs
item.description: ✈️ Overview What is BharatRadar, how the network works, and the current system status. Get started → 📡 Feed Set up your receiver in minutes. One-line install for new users or manual setup for existing receivers. Become a feeder → 🗺️ Feeders Only Exclusive resources for active feeders: personal map, MLAT sync, and raw data streams. Your map → 📊 Open Data Historical flight data, REST API, and aircraft data links — all free and open.

item.title: Privacy and License
item.description: This service is provided by myself @iakat and it is intended to use as is. Disclaimer of Warranties # BharatRadar will use its best efforts to provide accurate data. However, except as otherwise provided herein, the data is provided on an “as is” basis. Except as otherwise provided herein, neither BharatRadar, its partners, licensors, nor data providers make any warranty, either implied or express, of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose, including, but not limited to, the accuracy, timeliness, completeness, reliability, or availability of BharatRadar data, applications, or services accessible through or made available by BharatRadar.
